# CWE-208 positive: early return on failed secret compare (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-208-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-208 Observable Timing Discrepancy
// Vulnerable line: returns immediately when bytes differ.
func VerifyNonce(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, expected []byte) {
	provided := []byte(r.FormValue("nonce"))
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	for i := range expected {
		if provided[i] != expected[i] {
			w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
			_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "denied"})
			return
		}
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
}
